## Audit Evidence

- [ ] Owner identified for affected rule, source, lookup, dashboard, route, or access path.
- [ ] Tests run and results documented.
- [ ] Rollback plan documented.
- [ ] Sensitive data, secrets, token values, and private inventories are not committed.
- [ ] External ticket, approval, or secret-manager record linked when required.

## Validation

- [ ] `make validate-all`
- [ ] Live validation, if runtime behavior changed: `VALIDATE_ALL_LIVE=1 make validate-all`
- [ ] Not applicable, reason:

## Rollback

- Revert path:
- Runtime reload or restart needed:
